elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: the app is launched
Verify the "Digitization" screen is displayed
the user clicks on Next
Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
the user clicks on Finish
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
the user enters email "anilkumar.m@apms.ai"
the user enters password "1234"
the user clicks on Login
Verify the user should be logged in successfully
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Spares" feature

elements.name: Search and open Edit Spare popup

steps.name: User clicks on profile icon
verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
User clicks on "Configurations" section
verify the "Maintenance" section is displayed
User clicks on "Spares" feature
verify user navigates to "Spares" list screen
User has already created a Spare
User clicks on search icon
User taps on search input field
User clears existing text in search field
User enters newly created Spare Name
User waits for search results to load
system should display matching Spare records
User verifies Spare appears in list
User swipes Spare record from right to left
Edit option should be visible
User clicks on Edit button
"Edit Spare" popup should be displayed
Spare ID should be visible and non-editable
Status should be visible and clickable
Spare Name should be pre-filled and editable
Spare Code should be pre-filled and editable
UOM should be pre-filled and editable
Current Stock should be visible and non-editable
Description should be pre-filled and editable
Save button should be visible
Close "X" button should be visible
User clicks Close "X" button in Spare popup
User clicks search close X button
search field should be closed
module list should be in normal state
Verify User should be navigate into "Spares" list
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Spares" feature
